text.title: Scope Creep Parking Lot Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying scope-creep-parking-lot-protocol. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: BA says 'we'll note that' but nothing captured visibly.
antipattern.fix: Capture verbatim into the visible canvas; audit recordings for missing items.

antipattern.symptom: Live verdict ('that's out of scope') triggers client pushback.
antipattern.fix: Replace with 'Captured. We'll triage and respond within 48h.'
